projectDescription: A full-stack payment dashboard built with Go (Chi router) and React (Vite/Tailwind), featuring a REST API, PostgreSQL database, and Docker-based local development.
keyFeatures: Go REST API with Chi router serving payment CRUD endpoints
React 19 frontend with Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui components, and Recharts visualizations
PostgreSQL database with sqlc-generated type-safe queries
Docker Compose setup with live reloading via Air for local development
Fly.io deployment configuration for both backend and frontend
GitHub Actions CI/CD with automated tests and semantic releases
Drag-and-drop UI with dnd-kit and TanStack Query for data fetching
publicApiSurface: GET /payments/{id} — Get a payment by ID
